Done. New entry added to both `/mnt/data/giga-log.md` and `/mnt/data/bigclungus-meta/giga-log.md`, committed and pushed to GitHub (commit `04e2ce2`).

Entry summary:
- **Category:** `use-terminate-not-cancel` (new)
- **Date:** 2026-03-27
- **Count:** 1 / Severity: suggestion
- **Rule:** When stopping duplicate or runaway workflows, always use `temporal workflow terminate` (immediate) instead of `temporal workflow cancel` (graceful, lets in-flight activities complete).
